---

##    16\. I Fell In The Hottub 

**The 5 rules of Party Photography:**

  1. Take pictures right away-- while people still look good!
  2. Don't fall in the hottub.
  3. Share your camera around. Other people might take better pictures than you.
  4. Photograph creative people.
  5. Find your muse.



[ Complete and Continue   ]()

I struggle a bit with #1 . In my process i find that i need to vibe a little with the party or the situation with the camera out then pictures. If i go in for the shot too quick it seems like people are not ready to have me and i don't get the pics i want.

Get to the party early and just take really easy shots of people and get them used to your flash, and you being there... By the time the party is peaking it will all fall into place!

I would have to argue about falling in the hottub, its makes the story, doing something weird or embarrassing helps with getting past that guard people put up in social settings, enabling you to get the real shot. Sometimes you have to fall in the hottub.
